results.rendered_html:
sam-√i P. -eti, to go or come together, meet at (acc.) or with (instr. or dat.), encounter (as friends or enemies),  RV.  &c. &c.;
to come together in sexual union, cohabit (acc. or sārDam, saha),  MBh. ;  R. ;
to come to, arrive at, approach, visit, seek, enter upon, begin,  RV.  &c. &c.;
to lead to (acc.),  RV. iii, 54, 5 ;
to consent, agree with (instr. ‘it is agreed between’, with gen. of pers. and loc. of thing),  ŚBr. ;  MBh.  :
Pass. -īyate, to be united or met or resorted to &c.:
Intens. -īyate, to visit, frequent,  RV. ;
to appear, be manifested,  BhP.

results.rendered_html:
sami 2 P.
1 To come or meet together, be united or joined with.
2 To go or come to, arrive at, approach, reach, visit, attain.
3 To encounter, meet in a hostile manner.
4 To cohabit, have sexual intercourse.
5 To enter upon, commence.
6 To agree with.
